audit_question: 现行制度下，单笔费用报销达到多少金额需要部门总经理审批？请说明适用版本、金额边界及费用报销办法与授权管理办法中的制度依据，并说明旧版审批线是否仍适用。

scope.audit_object: 部门总经理审批金额阈值

policy_questions: What is the current single-expense threshold for department general manager (部门总经理) approval?
Which policy version applies (2025 revised vs 2022 deprecated)?
What are the exact amount boundaries?
What is the basis in the Expense Reimbursement Rules?
What is the basis in the Authorization Management Rules (Annex 2)?
Does the old 2022 approval line (8000 yuan) still apply?
evidence_needs: Policy text: 2025 Expense Reimbursement Rules Article 5 (delegation to Authorization Rules)
Policy text: Authorization Management Rules Annex 2 AR-03 (部门总经理 threshold)
Policy text: 2022 deprecated rules Article 2 (old 8000 line, now replaced)

execution_steps.description: Read all three policy documents and extract relevant clauses

complexity_reasons: No aggregation, grouping, or batch filtering
Straightforward policy lookup with clear version precedence
Old policy explicitly marked as deprecated with clear replacement

subagent_plan.reason: Complexity 0-1: keep in main agent; simple policy lookup with no data analysis

stopping_conditions: All three policy documents read and relevant clauses extracted
Amount boundary clearly identified from Annex 2
Evidence matrix, final result, and validation report all pass
